chart_title: R2 ladder: training fit vs calibration vs forecast R2
calculation_basis: Training-fit, calibration and forecast R2 are reported as separate governance ladder measures.
notes: Training-fit R2 is computed from fitted rows inside the rolling training windows. It is not an out-of-sample forecast metric. Training-fit R2 is not comparable to forecast R2. High paper-style R2 usually measures in-sample fit, while forecast R2 measures out-of-sample explanatory power after final model composition.
interpretation: Training-fit R2 is available; forecast R2 0.498 and calibration R2 0.521 remain out-of-sample measures.
